title: justicia orbicularis
intro: Justicia orbicularis, also known as the blue justicia or dwarf signal plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Justicia orbicularis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
